rulings.Case Title: MARILOU D SAMSON VS. ONE WEST BANK, FSB et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Intention To Move For New Trial
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 1, 2013, line 1. PLAINTIFF MARILOU SAMSON's Notice Of Intention To Move For New Trial DENIED. Plaintiff failed to carry her burden under CCP 657(7). Plaintiff was given 4 opportunities to allege a viable cause of action against named defendants. Plaintiff concedes that property was sold to a non-party. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHERONN RASHIDA JOHNSON et al VS. WARREN FOSTER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Tmn To Compel Further Responses To Discovery And Request For Monetary Sanction
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 1, 2013, line 2. PLAINTIFF CHERONN JOHNSON's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery And Request For Monetary Sanction GRANTED in part and DENIED in part as follows: Motion is GRANTED to the extent Defendant's responses contain objections. Mr. Haynes' Declaration filed on May 16, 2013 clearly states that Mr. Haynes sought discovery extension on May 2, 2013, 1o days after responses were due, i.e. objections have been waived. Defendant shall provide amended responses without objections within 10 days on notice of entry of order; Motion is DENIED otherwise, no "meet and confer" on issues other that objections. Specifically, motion is DENIED as to FROGs 14.1; and 15.1; SPROGs 1, 2, and 4. Sanctions are granted in the amount of $825 as to Mr. Haynes only. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARIA VANCIL VS. SAM QUON PON et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 1, 2013, line 9. DEFENDANT SAM PON and SUSAN PON's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend to allege the amount of damages as to causes of action for Breach of Warranty of Quiet Enjoyment, Fraud, and violation of CCC 1942.4. Any personal injury is merely incidental in these causes of action. Paragraph 34, 56, 64. Demurrer is overruled as to negligence, breach of warranty of habitability, NIED, IIED. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JCSF INVESTMENTS, LP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. BARBARA SHAPRAY et al

rulings.Case Title: RADHA KRISHNA, LLC VS. MICHAEL RAY MILES et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 1, 2013, line 6. DEFENDANT MICHAEL MILES' MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT Granted subject to (1) defendant presenting Proof of Service for Motion to Set Aside at the hearing; (2) posting $700 with the Court no later than October 1, 2013 no later than 4 p.m.; and (3) filing answer with the Court no later than October 1, 2013 by 4 p.m. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SPINDLER PROPERTIES, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. ALISON C WRIGHT et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 1, 2013, line 7. DEFENDANT ALISON WRIGHT and LEISA THORNTON's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint GRANTED, subject to opposition. Plaintiff failed to comply with SFRO 37.9A(f)(4)(E) and failed to give 120 day notice. See September 17, 2012 Notice. = (501/REQ)
